summary: All 4 findings from round 1 addressed. Tests are now behavioral, fast, and complete. test_master_class_not_dumpmaster uses runtime assertions; time.sleep is mocked across all thread-based tests; master return value is validated; addon order is verified. Suite: 213 passed, 13 skipped.

litmusTest.notes: All tests now fail if core logic is removed: (1) removing Master instantiation breaks patched_master.assert_called_once(); (2) removing any essential addon breaks subset+order assertions; (3) reordering addons breaks expected_order check; (4) adding Dumper breaks Dumper name check; (5) returning non-tuple breaks tuple/master assertions.

pyramidBalance.notes: Unit tests only — appropriate scope for Task 1 (addon wiring, no I/O). Integration coverage addressed by existing suite.
